title: Global Dry Bulk Market and Chinese Coal Market Remain Bullish
section_path: Global Dry Bulk Market and Chinese Coal Market Remain Bullish
section_path_text: Global Dry Bulk Market and Chinese Coal Market Remain Bullish
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Image reference: unsplash-image-aIG78YGhDmM.jpg | assets/2021-05-03_global-dry-bulk-market-and-chinese-coal-market-remain-bullish_img_unsplash-image-aig78yghdmm_f996e64aa9dc.jpg
Dry bulk rates increased across the board again last week, with capesize rates again finding the largest amount of support. Capesize rates ended last week up by 17%. Panamax rates ended up by 2%.
